description: The Mesh Plane Brush Tool component is used to draw non flat planes where you can cut holes into the mesh with a second brush stroke after the first one that defines the initial plane.

fields.StrokeGroupActive: Whether the current stroke group is active
fields.MaterialPreviews: the mesh renderers being used to preview the stroke
fields._currentMesh: The current mesh being used to show the brush stroke.
fields._currentHole: The current hole being cut into the constrained delaunay mesh.

methods.ChangeSize: Used to change the size of the brush.
